overview: A meeting scheduler for MaxFort School Rohini that lets visitors book time slots for online or in-person meetings. Admins manage availability and view all upcoming bookings from a protected dashboard.
features: Book online or physical meeting slots
Admin availability management with recurring weekly schedules
Block specific dates or time ranges
Visitor booking form with name, email, and meeting topic
Booking confirmation with location details for physical meetings
Admin dashboard with list/calendar view of all bookings
Real-time slot availability — booked slots instantly removed from options
